sub_modules.highpass_fir_sample_insert: Pure combinational shift-register input insertion block; forms the next tap-delay vector from the current vector and incoming sample.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_mac101: Pure combinational 101-tap signed multiply-accumulate engine with the exact hard-coded high-pass FIR coefficient set.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_q15_scale: Pure combinational fixed-point scaler; arithmetic right-shifts the 64-bit MAC result by 15 and truncates to the configured output width.
